title: IVF Index Tuning
text: IVF indices trade some recall for speed. Tune nprobe carefully because low nprobe can hurt recall while higher nprobe increases latency.

title: HNSW Configuration Guide
text: HNSW usually offers strong recall with fast lookup, but memory usage is higher because the graph structure stores more connections.

title: Embeddings Endpoint Reference
text: The embeddings API returns a dense vector, model metadata, and token usage fields for each request.

title: SDK Authentication
text: Use API keys or service tokens for SDK authentication. Rotate secrets regularly and store them in environment variables.

title: Chunking Tradeoffs
text: Small chunks improve precision while larger chunks preserve context. Recursive chunking is a common balanced default.

title: Why Reranking Helps
text: Initial retrieval is about recall. Reranking improves ordering by moving the most relevant passages higher.

title: HyDE Retrieval Idea
text: HyDE works by generating a hypothetical answer-like document and retrieving against that richer semantic text instead of the raw query.

title: Step-Back Prompting
text: Step-back prompting rewrites a narrow query into a broader conceptual question so retrieval can capture supporting context.

title: Slow Retrieval Debug Guide
text: Slow retrieval often comes from flat indices, high nprobe settings, expensive reranking, oversized chunks, or missing metadata filters.

title: Memory Pressure in Search
text: Large flat indices and graph-heavy structures can increase RAM pressure. HNSW often uses more memory than IVF.

title: Low Recall Playbook
text: Low recall usually means poor chunking, weak query wording, weak embeddings, or overly strict filters.

title: Wrong Citation Debugging
text: If answers cite weak passages, inspect ranking, reranking, and chunk boundaries before changing the prompt.

title: Password Reset Policy
text: Users can reset passwords with the Forgot Password link on the login screen. A reset email is then sent.

title: Refund Policy
text: Refunds are available within 30 days for eligible purchases. Digital goods may be non-refundable.

title: Workspace Ownership
text: Only workspace owners can delete a workspace, and exporting important data first is recommended.

title: Plan and Billing Limits
text: Starter has fewer seats and advanced features than Pro or Enterprise. Some security features are Enterprise-only.
